positive: A mystical woodland scene viewed through a stylized stencil cutout. Dominant subjects include glowing bioluminescent fungi clusters, intricate spider webs adorned with dew drops, and ethereal forest sprites barely visible among the roots. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, electric teal, jade green, and luminous yellow. The style should be graphic novel meets nature illustration, emphasizing strong, clean silhouettes and bold linework. Composition must be centrally balanced and suitable for repeat print design. Cinematic, volumetric lighting creating dramatic backlighting and deep shadows. Highly detailed, vector-art aesthetic, perfect for t-shirt printing.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, blur, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grainy, artifacts, sketch, photorealism
